Notes: Fast SSH/Telnet/Serial client with file manager. Hardcoded installer step.

Notes: Disk usage analyzer. Hardcoded in $LinuxKB and installer.

Linux Package(s): PaperCut Print Deploy Native Linux client

Linux Package(s): notepadqq (APT) + geany (APT) + Notepad++ Windows .exe under Wine
Notes: Both native Linux alternatives AND the real Notepad++ under Wine. Hardcoded Wine install step in installer.

Name: PowerToys
Linux Package(s): Frog (OCR) + Ulauncher (Run) + gpick (Color Picker) + nautilus-image-converter + imagemagick (Image Resizer) + Barrier (Mouse Without Borders) + KMag (ZoomIt) + ibus-typing-booster (Keyboard) + lsof (File Locksmith) + Info-only (Find My Mouse, Shortcut Guide)
Source / URL: Flathub: com.tenderowl.frog, com.github.debauchee.barrier; APT: ulauncher (PPA on noble), gpick, nautilus-image-converter, imagemagick, kmag, ibus-typing-booster, lsof
Notes: Maps to 10 separate Linux packages, one per PowerToys feature. Hardcoded split in installer with individual step labels.

Name: WinRAR
Linux Package(s): p7zip-full + p7zip-rar + unrar (APT) + PeaZip (APT) + WinRAR Windows .exe under Wine
Notes: Native RAR support via APT packages + the real WinRAR installed under Wine. Hardcoded Wine install step in installer.

Notes: Native alternatives + the real IDM under Wine. Hardcoded Wine install + extension pages in installer.

In installed_windows_software.csv?: Yes (Grammarly CSV row present, LanguageTool listed as alternative)
Notes: Installed to /opt/languagetool with wrapper at /usr/local/bin/languagetool. Hardcoded script/binary install step.

Name: Wine

Name: VirtualBox
Notes: Oracle VirtualBox. Additional virtualization option alongside VMware. Hardcoded installer step.

Name: PostgreSQL
Windows App?: No, installed as dependency for pgAdmin/pgNow workflows
In installed_windows_software.csv?: No (pgAdmin and pgNow ARE in CSV)
Notes: Official PostgreSQL PGDG repository. Installed alongside pgAdmin for full database environment. Hardcoded explicit requirement in installer.

Windows App?: Yes, exists on Windows as Docker Desktop
Linux Package(s): docker-ce + docker-ce-cli + containerd.io + docker-buildx-plugin + docker-compose-plugin (APT repo)
Notes: Docker Engine native on Linux (no VM needed, unlike Docker Desktop). Hardcoded with service enable + user group addition.

Name: Multipass
Notes: Canonical Multipass for quick Ubuntu VMs. Hardcoded extra in installer.

Name: Microsoft OneNote
In installed_windows_software.csv?: Yes (Microsoft To Do + Sticky Notes are in CSV)
Linux Package(s): Obsidian (Flatpak/.deb) + Joplin (Flatpak) + Xournal++ (APT) + OneNote WebApp .desktop shortcut
Notes: Note-taking suite: Obsidian/Joplin for rich linked notes with cloud sync; Xournal++ for handwritten/PDF annotation; OneNote web shortcut.

Name: Sticky Notes
Notes: Sticky notes: GNOME Sticky Notes for simple desktop notes; Joplin for full-featured cloud-synced notes.
